title: Spryzeen's Creaking Vines
body:
# Spryzeen's Creaking Vines
![Creaking Vines + Falling Leaves](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f2a8871c0a201a19519acd8ed9b1c7493b55cd31_0.webp)

![cover](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/NWtObsxs/images/cea962c467fc7a4413b1fde48d54bc9bdec74c8a.png)

I think pale hanging roots are boring and ugly, so I created this pack to enhance the atmosphere of the Pale Garden biome. It also utilizes the new vanilla emissivity feature, improving the biome's ambiance and helping the creaking blend in better. 

> Bushy leaves pack in the first image: (https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/spryzeens-falling-leaves)
<details>
<summary>Features</summary>

- Full vanilla texture pack, you don't need any mod or something.
- Cool look pale hanging roots.
- Help creaking to disguise :).
- More inmersive environment.
- Beautiful nights in pale garden with vanilla emissivity features.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Requirements</summary>

- None!

</details>

<details>
<summary>Known Issues</summary>

- None!
</details>
